title: Pan-Seared Beef Fillet with Sour Delight Sauce
description: A flavorful and savory dish featuring tender beef fillet cooked to perfection and served with a tangy sour delight sauce.
instructions: Season the beef fillet with salt and black pepper.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the beef fillet for 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for 8-10 minutes for medium-rare.
While the beef cooks, mix sour cream, delight vinegar, and garlic in a small bowl.
Remove the beef from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Serve the beef with the sour delight sauce and garnish with parsley.
